Resume

Experience

2025 - Present
In-Field Mentor
Missionary Training Center
Provo, UT

Serve as an In-Field Mentor at the MTC, coaching and supporting missionaries as they transition into their full-time service. Provide individualized guidance, feedback, and instruction to help missionaries develop effective teaching and communication skills. Facilitate group training sessions and model best practices for leadership and outreach in the field.

2022 - 2023 & 2025 - Present
Independent Day Trader
Options & Futures
Self-Directed

Actively traded options and futures markets for 1.5 years prior to missionary service and have continued trading for over a year since returning. Developed a rigorous self-directed approach to market research, risk management, and technical analysis. This experience has been foundational in building mental discipline, patience, and the ability to perform under pressure — skills that carry directly into academic and professional settings.

2019 - 2023
Crew Leader
Taco Amigo
Pleasant Grove, UT

Worked for 3.5 years at a locally owned fast food restaurant, advancing to a crew leader role. Supervised and coordinated team members during busy service periods, maintained quality and efficiency standards, and helped train new employees. Developed strong interpersonal communication, time management, and leadership skills in a fast-paced environment.

2023 - 2025
Full-Time Volunteer Missionary
Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
Flagstaff, AZ

Completed a two-year volunteer mission in the Flagstaff, Arizona area. Taught and mentored individuals and families, managed a personal schedule entirely independently, and regularly led and coordinated small teams of fellow missionaries. Gained exceptional public speaking, cross-cultural communication, and problem-solving experience while serving in diverse communities.

Education

2025 - Present
Brigham Young University
Provo, UT
Undergraduate
Economics

Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Economics at Brigham Young University. Coursework emphasizes quantitative analysis, microeconomic and macroeconomic theory, and data-driven decision making. Engaged in campus life and committed to academic excellence.

2019 - 2023
Pleasant Grove High School
Pleasant Grove, UT
High School Diploma
4.0 GPA

Graduated with a 4.0 GPA from Pleasant Grove High School in 2023. Balanced academics with competitive sports and extracurricular activities throughout high school, demonstrating strong time management and a commitment to personal excellence in all areas.

Teaching & Mentorship
